name: Fresh setup with Bootstrap uses withThemeByDataAttribute and data-bs-theme
query: Set up Chromatic to test light and dark themes. We're using Bootstrap 5.
context: No existing @storybook/addon-themes import and no modes.ts. Bootstrap 5 is installed. Bootstrap uses data-bs-theme='dark' on the html element to switch themes.
expected_behavior: Fetches the Bootstrap getting-started guide from the storybook addon-themes repo
Uses withThemeByDataAttribute with attributeName set to 'data-bs-theme'
Creates .storybook/modes.ts with light and dark modes
success_criteria: The response uses withThemeByDataAttribute, not withThemeByClassName
The decorator's themes object keys match the keys used in allModes
